user_query: I want to surprise my friends with a sustainable picnic in the park. Can you recommend some eco-friendly picnic spots in the city? Also, provide me with the carbon footprint of different types of motorbikes for short-distance travel.

TaskList.description: Research and compile a list of eco-friendly picnic spots in the city.
Collect data on the carbon footprint of different types of motorbikes for short-distance travel.
Combine the picnic spot recommendations and motorbike carbon footprint data into a user-friendly report.
